text.title: AGENTS.md for Receiving Team Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example of AGENTS.md for Receiving Team producing a valid spec artefact, anonymised for portability.

step.name: trigger
step.text: Engagement onboarded; the AGENTS.md for Receiving Team methodology was selected after Applies-If was satisfied (named owner Ruslan Faion, downstream consumer engagement charter, source-of-truth in docs/).

step.name: apply-rules
step.text: Walked the five rules from 01-core-rules.xml. r1-r4 passed on first review; r5 required a follow-up because the section was missing concrete file globs. Captured the gap, patched, re-ran.

step.name: produce
step.text: Filled templates/agents-md-for-receiving-team.* with the four sections; emitted artefact_id with date; signed off by the engagement owner.

step.name: validate
step.text: Ran scripts/validate-agents-md-for-receiving-team.py --file <path>; validator returned 0; smoke test artefact passed too.

text.example: Applies-If held → inputs reachable → rules walked → artefact filled → validator returned 0 → owner signed off → downstream consumer registered.
